tasks.step: Add --version / -v flag to CLI and create tool launcher scripts
tasks.notes: Created src/cli.ts supporting version flags and created launcher scripts: tool, tool.ps1, tool.cmd

tasks.step: Implement validation for empty or blank strings
tasks.notes: Implemented validation checks in src/cli.ts to reject empty and whitespace-only command or arguments (specifically for add command).

tasks.step: Implement help command and help flags
tasks.notes: Implemented help command and help flags (--help and -h) in src/cli.ts to display usage instructions and exit 0.
